hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *"/frontend/"*) out=$(cd /home/charif/My_Projects/apex-topup/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then jq -n --arg o "$out" '{"systemMessage":"⚠️ Frontend type-check (tsc --noEmit) failed","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":("Frontend tsc --noEmit failed after this edit:\n"+$o)}}'; fi;; esac
